def: To run out or forth; to extend. [Obs.] Harvey.
Monotonous; dull; commonplace. "A humdrum crone." Bryant.
By stabbing; with intent to injure covertly. Bp. Parker.
The quality of being inharmonious; want of harmony; discord.The inharmoniousness of a verse. A. Tucker.
The act or process of implantating.
The secretion from the salivary glands.
A separate, private, or obscure street; an out of the way orcross street.He seeks by-streets, and saves the expensive coach. Gay.
